articles.title: 10 predictions for the Red Sox this season
articles.description:
First prediction: Garrett Crochet wins the Cy Young Award.

The post 10 predictions for the Red Sox this season appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Garrett Crochet is predicted to win the Cy Young Award this season.
Roman Anthony is expected to make a significant impact on the team's performance.
Local fans can anticipate an exciting season with potential playoff implications.
